creator: freebsd@simweb.ch
text:
Hi

Since in the past I've contributed small patches for p5-FusionInventory-Agent I'd like to offer taking over the maintainership of this port since vg@ mentioned on the mailing list about dropping this and other ports. (Source: https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2018-February/112647.html)

Although they are somehow related, if nobody steps up to it, I might also offer a hand for net-mgmt/glpi-plugins-fusioninventory-server. However I don't have experience with porting PHP things yet.

-- Mathieu
